name: Algo Sensei
description_en: A personal DSA and LeetCode mentor: problem explanations, progressive hints, code reviews, mock interviews, pattern recognition, complexity analysis, and custom problem generation—teaching through the Socratic method rather than handing over answers.
description_zh: 个人化的数据结构与算法 / LeetCode 导师:题目讲解、渐进式提示、代码评审、模拟面试、模式识别、复杂度分析与自定义出题——以苏格拉底式提问引导,而非直接给答案。
long_en: Emphasizes understanding and pattern intuition over memorization, adapting hint depth to the learner instead of revealing full solutions up front.
long_zh: 强调理解与模式直觉而非死记硬背,按学习者调整提示深度,而不是一上来就给出完整解法。
sec_note_en: A self-contained prompt-based tutor; it does not require external services or network access.
sec_note_zh: 一个自包含的提示式导师;不依赖外部服务或联网。
